result_semantics.completed: Implementation code and visual evidence were produced for the active slice and are ready for orchestrator/user visual review.
result_semantics.partial: Useful implementation/evidence was produced, but named visual states, assets, parity gaps, or checks remain.
result_semantics.blocked: Approved visual source, page contract, target project/route, asset/tool/runtime access, or non-waivable product/technical input is missing.
result_semantics.failed: No usable implementation slice was produced; include cause and recovery recommendation.

review_policy_notes: Visual parity review is review_required, not blocked.
Use blocked for missing approved source, missing page contract/pass criteria, inaccessible project path, unavailable required tool/dependency, or unsafe side effect scope.
Implementation screenshots are evidence, not authoritative design sources.
DesignToCode may suggest Kanban updates, but PlanToDelivery records canonical gates and unlocks downstream interaction/API work.
